general:
{
  "g.1": {
    "signals": {
      "g.1.a": 5,
      "g.1.b": 4,

    "used_chunk_ids": [

      "sectdars__001_a",
      "sectdars__001_d",
      "sectdars__001_g",
      "sectdars__001_i"
    ],
    "pros": "The application demonstrates a clear research vision to improve nutritional care in Head and Neck Cancer (HNC) and a distinct trajectory to become a clinical research leader (g.1.a, g.1.b). The training plan is exceptionally well-justified, mapping specific courses (e.g., JBI scoping review, NVivo, Implementation Science) directly to project needs and career goals (g.1.c). Strong mentorship is evidenced by a multi-disciplinary supervisory team with complementary expertise and a structured framework of monthly meetings (g.1.d).",
    "drawbacks": "While the vision is clear, the specific 'independent direction' (g.1.b) is heavily reliant on the existing infrastructure of the UCLH/UCL partnership, though this is standard for a fellowship."
  },
  "g.2": {
    "signals": {
      "g.2.a": 5,
      "g.2.b": 5,
      "g.2.c": 5,
      "g.2.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secarb__001_g",
      "sectdars__001_a",
      "sectdars__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_p"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant explicitly identifies this fellowship as the 'crucial next step' to transition from a developing academic to a research leader, detailing how it builds on existing quantitative skills to gain qualitative and implementation expertise (g.2.a, g.2.c). The award is positioned to enable the development of a perioperative nutrition group and an ERAS Centre, directly addressing career progression (g.2.b). Partnerships with professional bodies (BDA, BAHNO) and patient groups (Young Tongues) are clearly outlined as part of the development plan (g.2.d).",
    "drawbacks": "The specific mechanisms for how the award will uniquely accelerate partnerships compared to standard employment are implied but could be more explicitly detailed in terms of new network creation versus existing maintenance."
  },
  "g.3": {
    "signals": {
      "g.3.a": 5,
      "g.3.b": 5,
      "g.3.c": 5
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_c",
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_b",
      "sectdars__001_a",
      "sectdars__001_b"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant has extensive prior experience in quantitative and qualitative methods, including trial delivery (SIPSMART2) and service evaluations (g.3.a). Formal training is evidenced by an MRes, MSc, and specific certifications in biostatistics (g.3.b). There is a strong alignment between this prior experience and the skills required for the proposed mixed-methods project, with the training plan specifically targeting remaining gaps in rapid qualitative methods and advanced statistics (g.3.c).",
    "drawbacks": "No significant drawbacks; the evidence of prior experience and training is robust and directly relevant."
  },
  "g.4": {
    "signals": {
      "g.4.a": 5,
      "g.4.b": 4,
      "g.4.c": 5,
      "g.4.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_d",
      "secac__001_e",
      "secac__001_f",
      "secarb__001_b",
      "secarb__001_d",
      "secppi__001_a"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant has a strong publication record (10+ items) in peer-reviewed journals and has secured competitive grants (Chief Nurse Fellowship, NIHR Bridging, BRC PPI starter-grant) (g.4.a, g.4.c). The research background highlights successful outputs including conference presentations and awards (Best Abstract Prize) (g.4.a). The practical impact of previous work is demonstrated through service evaluations and the formation of a PPI group (g.4.d).",
    "drawbacks": "Citation metrics (g.4.b) are not explicitly quantified in the provided text, though the quality of journals and awards serves as a strong proxy."
  },
  "g.5": {
    "signals": {
      "g.5.a": 5,
      "g.5.b": 5,
      "g.5.c": 5,
      "g.5.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_a",
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_g",
      "secarb__001_c",
      "secarb__001_f",
      "sectdars__001_a",
      "sectdars__001_d"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant clearly states long-term ambitions to lead a research group and establish an ERAS Centre of Excellence (g.5.a). There is clear evidence of increasing responsibility, progressing from Band 5 to Band 8a Clinical Lead and Associate Principal Investigator roles, including supervising dissertations (g.5.b). Participation in leadership programs (Rosalind Franklin Programme, Implementation Science Masterclass) supports the trajectory (g.5.c). Recognition by peers is evidenced by awards and successful grant applications (g.5.d).",
    "drawbacks": "While the trajectory is strong, the specific 'leadership' of a large team is currently at the Associate PI level; the fellowship is the step to full independence."
  },
  "g.6": {
    "signals": {
      "g.6.a": 5,
      "g.6.b": 5,
      "g.6.c": 5,
      "g.6.d": 4
    },
    "used_chunk_ids": [
      "secac__001_a",
      "secac__001_b",
      "secac__001_c",
      "secarb__001_a",
      "secarb__001_b",
      "sectdars__001_e",
      "sectdars__001_f"
    ],
    "pros": "The applicant explicitly commits to a practitioner-academic career, maintaining clinical practice (one day/fortnight) alongside the PhD (g.6.a, g.6.c). There is strong evidence of involvement in clinical research, including service evaluations and trial delivery (g.6.b). The applicant is a member of relevant professional networks (BDA, BAHNO) and holds relevant qualifications (g.6.d).",
    "drawbacks": "No significant drawbacks; the balance between practice and research is clearly articulated and supported by the proposed schedule."
  }
}
